# Swim to Surf

## About
Swim to Surf provides private, one-on-one swim lessons in American Fork, Utah. We focus on calm coaching, real water confidence, and strong safety fundamentals for swimmers of all ages (0–99).

## Services
- Private swim lessons (1:1)
- Infant lessons (15 minutes) and standard lessons (30 minutes)
- Summer scheduling with two instructors:
  - Lukaah: weekly (Mon–Fri) at a consistent daily start time
  - Estee: monthly (Wed/Thu) with optional second weekday

## Locations / Service Area
- American Fork, Utah (Utah County)

## Contact
- Email: swimtosurfemail@gmail.com
- Phone: 385-499-8036
- Website: https://swimtosurf.co

## Key Links
- Home: https://swimtosurf.co/
- Book: https://swimtosurf.co/book
- Instructors: https://swimtosurf.co/instructors
- FAQ: https://swimtosurf.co/faq
- About: https://swimtosurf.co/about
- Contact: https://swimtosurf.co/contact

## What to Know
- Bookings are confirmed by email with a confirmation code.
- Payments:
  - Online checkout via Stripe (card / Apple Pay)
  - Pay later options (Venmo / cash / in person)

## Email delivery (for operators)
- **Booking confirmations (pay later + after Stripe):** If `RESEND_FROM_EMAIL` is still Resend’s test address (`onboarding@resend.dev`), the app automatically sends those emails via **Gmail SMTP** when these are set (same as `scripts/email-blast/send-via-gmail.mjs`):
  - `GMAIL_USER` — e.g. `swimtosurfemail@gmail.com`
  - `GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD` — Google App Password (2FA required), not the normal login password
  - Optional: `BOOKING_USE_GMAIL_SMTP=1` forces Gmail for confirmations even after you verify a Resend domain.
- **Resend** (`RESEND_API_KEY` + verified `RESEND_FROM_EMAIL`) is still used when not on `resend.dev` and Gmail fallback is off — best long-term once DNS can be pointed for domain verification (TXT/SPF/DKIM). Wix-hosted DNS can be limiting; Gmail SMTP works without changing the domain’s mail DNS.
- `RESEND_REPLY_TO` should be the public contact inbox (e.g. swimtosurfemail@gmail.com).
